title: Dermatology services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology services in Quito with clear diagnosis, indicated technology, and follow-up you can actually understand.
heading: Dermatology services
introTitle: Find the route that best matches what your skin needs today
introDeck: Each service outlines judgment, timing, and follow-up so you can understand the plan before taking the next step.

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
featured.copy: A complete first reading that sets priorities and leaves you with a clear plan from the first visit.

featured.title: Case-indicated dermatology laser
featured.copy: Technology chosen by phototype, goal, and recovery window, with settings reviewed at every control point.

featured.title: Telemedicine with responsible escalation
featured.copy: Remote care clarifies the next step and speeds in-clinic review when direct examination changes the decision.

sections.title: Clinical foundation
sections.deck: Routes built to clarify diagnosis and sustain control of common conditions through staged follow-up.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: An initial reading that orders risk, priorities, and treatment direction before anything else begins.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flares and sensitivity are managed through medical adjustments based on your actual skin response.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early lesion assessment with warning criteria and a monitoring plan that is not left for later.

sections.title: Medical treatments
sections.deck: Procedures and technology are indicated only when they add clinical value and can be monitored safely.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Traceable settings for lesions, pigment, or scars, with medical control before and after every session.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: Skin renewal calibrated by phototype, sensitivity, and therapeutic goal.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Progressive support for firmness and skin quality, indicated responsibly and reviewed by zone.

sections.title: Continuity and family
sections.deck: Programs for longer follow-up, mixed presentations, and family decisions that need structure.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Pediatric care with clear guidance for caregivers, school routines, and daily life.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: An integrated route for combined symptoms that need coordinated clinical reading.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Remote guidance helps decide whether online continuity is enough or clinic review is the better next step.

initiatives.title: Clinical photo registry
initiatives.copy: Images are compared under equivalent conditions to read change with greater precision.

initiatives.title: Active flare pathway
initiatives.copy: We adjust early when lesions return or the skin becomes more reactive.

initiatives.title: Guided family decisions
initiatives.copy: A clear home plan with warning signs and steps a family can actually follow.

initiatives.title: Pigmented lesion route
initiatives.copy: Consultation is prioritized when a mole or spot has changed in a recent way.

initiatives.title: Phototype calibration
initiatives.copy: Energy, frequency, and recovery are tuned to your skin's measured response.

initiatives.title: Skin support sequence
initiatives.copy: Sessions are combined with honest expectations to improve texture, firmness, and continuity.

initiatives.title: Consent in plain language
initiatives.copy: Rights and responsibilities are explained clearly, without unnecessary legal weight.

initiatives.title: Responsible remote escalation
initiatives.copy: Remote care keeps clear thresholds for moving into clinic at the right time.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: You can begin with telemedicine or choose the clinical route that best fits your symptoms and priority.
